name: PT FKS Food Sejahtera Tbk
summary: PT FKS Food Sejahtera Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in food manufacturing and rice milling businesses in Indonesia. The company offers dried and instant noodles, dried and corn vermicelli, biscuits, candies, and snacks. It is also involved in palm oil plantation activity; and the operation of electric power plant. The company was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia.
